## Summary

What does this PR change?

## Type

- [ ] New screener
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Content / copy update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Refactor or tooling
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes (if UI changed)
- [ ] For new screeners: licence verified, citation included, tests added
- [ ] For content changes: word count meets target where applicable
- [ ] No copyrighted instruments added
- [ ] No PII collected or transmitted
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

Closes #
